—
0
COINS
Complete challenges → earn coins → spend in Trade tab
🔄 TRADE
🏆 WEEKEND LEAGUE
Fri-Sun only · 10 matches · Bronze to Elite rewards
⭐ ICON MOMENTS
Complete special challenges to unlock legendary career moment cards
🔄 CARD TRADING
Generate a code for a duplicate card · Share with friends · Trade!
⏰ TRAINING CAMP
Send a player to camp for 4 hours · Returns with +3 OVR permanent boost!
🤝 LOAN MARKET
Borrow a card for one tournament · 🪙100 fee · Returns after use
🏪 TRANSFER MARKET
6 cards available to buy directly · Refreshes every 6 hours
🎯 CARD OBJECTIVES
Complete challenges to unlock special cards
🔨 SQUAD BUILDING CHALLENGES
Submit specific player combinations to earn special cards
🃏 TRADE DUPLICATES
Spend 3 duplicate cards of the same rarity → get a random card of that rarity
♻️ RECYCLE DUPLICATES
Select 3 duplicate cards → receive 1 random Special card. Only cards you own 2+ copies of can be recycled.
🎁 MYSTERY BOX
Spend 250 coins → guaranteed Legendary or better card.
🖼️ CARD SHOWCASE
Pick your 5 favourite cards to display on your profile
⚽ CLUB SETS
Collect enough cards from one club to earn a Club Legend reward!
🎨 CUSTOM CARD CREATOR
Fill in the details and create your own unique card for 🪙150. It gets added to your collection!
💰 STORE
🎁 FREE COINS
Earn free coins every day — no purchase needed!
📅 DAILY BONUS
Come back every day for free coins
📺 WATCH AD
Watch a short video for coins (3x per day)
🎡 LUCKY WHEEL
Spin for coins, packs & special cards (once per day)
🎰 CARD ROULETTE
Spend 🪙500 · Spin for a random card rarity · Could be Gold, Legendary, In-Form, MOTM or Heroes!
📅 DAILY MISSIONS
3 fresh missions every day · Complete all 3 for bonus Season Pass XP!
⭐ PREMIUM PASS
Double rewards on all 20 Season Pass tiers · Exclusive cards + bonus coins every tier
🏆 PLAYER OF THE YEAR 2025/26
Vote for the best player of the season. Voting opens July 20 — October 1. Your vote earns 🪙2,000 + a Legendary card!
🏦 BUY COINS
Support the game — purchase coin bundles instantly.
Payments are processed securely via Stripe. This is a demo — no real charges will occur.
